name: Butter Almond Classic Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup I CAN'T BELIEVE IT'S NOT BUTTER! (spread, unsalted or regular, softened)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat I CAN'T BELIEVE IT'S NOT BUTTER! with 1/2 cup sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add almond extract.
3. Sift flour and gradually add to the mixture.
4. Add almonds and mix together until a dough forms.
5. Shape dough into a ball, place in plastic wrap, and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F.
7. Divide dough into 8 pieces.
8. Lightly flour hands and work surface.
9. Roll each piece of dough into a half-inch thick roll.
10. Cut each roll into two-inch pieces.
11. Arrange on ungreased cookie sheets and shape each into a crescent, tapering the ends by gently pinching them.
12. Bake for 18-20 minutes or until very lightly brown.
13. Cool cookies; dust with sifted remaining sugar.
14. Store in an airtight container.
